## derived_price_technical

Phase 3 trading technical core physical table: price_technical

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| ma_5_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_5_hfq | ma_5_hfq = avg(derived_daily_spine.close_hfq, 5) |
| ma_10_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_10_hfq | ma_10_hfq = avg(derived_daily_spine.close_hfq, 10) |
| ma_20_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_20_hfq | ma_20_hfq = avg(derived_daily_spine.close_hfq, 20) |
| ma_60_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_60_hfq | ma_60_hfq = avg(derived_daily_spine.close_hfq, 60) |
| ma_120_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_120_hfq | ma_120_hfq = avg(derived_daily_spine.close_hfq, 120) |
| ma_250_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_250_hfq | ma_250_hfq = avg(derived_daily_spine.close_hfq, 250) |
| close_to_ma_20_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_to_ma_20_hfq | close_to_ma_20_hfq = close_hfq / ma_20_hfq - 1 |
| close_to_ma_60_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_to_ma_60_hfq | close_to_ma_60_hfq = close_hfq / ma_60_hfq - 1 |
| ma_20_slope_20_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_20_slope_20_hfq | ma_20_slope_20_hfq = ma_20_hfq / lag(ma_20_hfq,20) - 1 |
| ma_60_slope_60_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ma_60_slope_60_hfq | ma_60_slope_60_hfq = ma_60_hfq / lag(ma_60_hfq,60) - 1 |
| rsi_14 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | rsi_14 | rsi_14 = RSI(close_hfq, 14) |
| price_position_20_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | price_position_20_hfq | price_position_20_hfq = (close_hfq - min(low_hfq,20)) / (max(high_hfq,20)-min(low_hfq,20)) |
| price_position_60_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | price_position_60_hfq | price_position_60_hfq = (close_hfq - min(low_hfq,60)) / (max(high_hfq,60)-min(low_hfq,60)) |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 |

## derived_return_momentum

Phase 3 trading technical core physical table: return_momentum

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |

| ret_2_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_2_hfq | ret_2_hfq = close_hfq / lag(close_hfq,2) - 1 |
| ret_5_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_5_hfq | ret_5_hfq = close_hfq / lag(close_hfq,5) - 1 |
| ret_10_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_10_hfq | ret_10_hfq = close_hfq / lag(close_hfq,10) - 1 |
| ret_20_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq | ret_20_hfq = close_hfq / lag(close_hfq,20) - 1 |
| ret_60_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_60_hfq | ret_60_hfq = close_hfq / lag(close_hfq,60) - 1 |
| ret_120_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_120_hfq | ret_120_hfq = close_hfq / lag(close_hfq,120) - 1 |

## derived_volatility_risk

Phase 3 trading technical core physical table: volatility_risk

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| hv_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | hv_20 | hv_20 = stddev_samp(log_ret_1_hfq,20) * sqrt(242) |
| hv_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | hv_60 | hv_60 = stddev_samp(log_ret_1_hfq,60) * sqrt(242) |
| hv_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | hv_120 | hv_120 = stddev_samp(log_ret_1_hfq,120) * sqrt(242) |
| parkinson_vol_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | parkinson_vol_20 | parkinson_vol_20 = sqrt(avg((ln(high_hfq/low_hfq))^2,20)/(4*ln(2))*242) |
| atr_14_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | atr_14_hfq | atr_14_hfq = avg(true_range_hfq,14) |
| atr_14_pct_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | atr_14_pct_hfq | atr_14_pct_hfq = atr_14_hfq / close_hfq |
| max_drawdown_20_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | max_drawdown_20_hfq | max_drawdown_20_hfq = min(close_hfq / rolling_max(close_hfq,20)-1,20) |
| max_drawdown_60_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | max_drawdown_60_hfq | max_drawdown_60_hfq = min(close_hfq / rolling_max(close_hfq,60)-1,60) |
| downside_vol_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | downside_vol_60 | downside_vol_60 = stddev_samp(min(log_ret_1_hfq,0),60) * sqrt(242) |
| var_5pct_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | var_5pct_60 | var_5pct_60 = quantile(ret_1_hfq,0.05,60) |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 |

| market | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | market | 市场板块 |

| high_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | high_raw | 不复权最高价 |

| pre_close_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pre_close_raw | 不复权昨收价 |
| change_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | change_raw | 不复权涨跌额 |
| pct_chg_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pct_chg_raw | 不复权涨跌幅 |
| volume | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | volume | 成交量 |
| amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | amount | 成交额 |
| amplitude_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | amplitude_raw | 不复权振幅 |

| latest_adj_factor_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_adj_factor_asof | 最新复权因子 |
| open_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | open_hfq | 后复权开盘价 |
| high_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | high_hfq | 后复权最高价 |
| low_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | low_hfq | 后复权最低价 |
| close_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_hfq | 后复权收盘价 |
| pre_close_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pre_close_hfq | 后复权昨收价 |
| ret_1_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_1_raw | 不复权1日简单收益率 |
| ret_1_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_1_hfq | 后复权1日简单收益率 |
| log_ret_1_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_ret_1_hfq | 后复权1日对数收益率 |
| overnight_ret_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | overnight_ret_hfq | 后复权隔夜收益率 |
| intraday_ret_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | intraday_ret_hfq | 后复权日内收益率 |
| high_low_range_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | high_low_range_hfq | 后复权日内高低区间 |

| close_position_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_position_hfq | 后复权收盘价在日内区间的位置 |

| down_limit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | down_limit | 跌停价 |
| limit_up_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | limit_up_flag | 收盘涨停标记，按最小价格变动单位判断 |
| limit_down_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | limit_down_flag | 收盘跌停标记，按最小价格变动单位判断 |
| touch_limit_up_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | touch_limit_up_flag | 盘中触及涨停标记，按最小价格变动单位判断 |
| touch_limit_down_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | touch_limit_down_flag | 盘中触及跌停标记，按最小价格变动单位判断 |
| open_limit_up_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | open_limit_up_flag | 开盘涨停标记，按最小价格变动单位判断 |
| open_limit_down_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | open_limit_down_flag | 开盘跌停标记，按最小价格变动单位判断 |
| limit_up_gap | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | limit_up_gap | 收盘价距离涨停价的比例 |
| limit_down_gap | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | limit_down_gap | 收盘价距离跌停价的比例 |
| has_price | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_price | 是否有完整OHLC价格 |
| has_adj_factor | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_adj_factor | 是否有复权因子 |
| has_limit_price | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_limit_price | 是否有涨跌停价 |
| price_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | price_valid_flag | OHLC价格关系是否有效 |
| missing_reason | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | missing_reason | 行情或辅助数据缺失原因 |
| open_qfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | open_qfq | open_qfq = open_raw * adj_factor / latest_adj_factor_asof |
| high_qfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | high_qfq | high_qfq = high_raw * adj_factor / latest_adj_factor_asof |
| low_qfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | low_qfq | low_qfq = low_raw * adj_factor / latest_adj_factor_asof |
| close_qfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | close_qfq | close_qfq = close_raw * adj_factor / latest_adj_factor_asof |
| pre_close_qfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pre_close_qfq | pre_close_qfq = pre_close_raw * adj_factor / latest_adj_factor_asof |
| body_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | body_raw | body_raw = close_raw - open_raw |
| upper_shadow_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | upper_shadow_raw | upper_shadow_raw = high_raw - greatest(open_raw, close_raw) |
| lower_shadow_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | lower_shadow_raw | lower_shadow_raw = least(open_raw, close_raw) - low_raw |
| body_ratio_raw | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | body_ratio_raw | body_ratio_raw = abs(close_raw-open_raw)/nullif(high_raw-low_raw,0) |
| true_range_hfq | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | true_range_hfq | true_range_hfq = max(high_hfq-low_hfq, abs(high_hfq-lag(close_hfq)), abs(low_hfq-lag(close_hfq))) |
| suspended_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | suspended_flag | suspended_flag = volume is null or volume = 0 |
| one_price_limit_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | one_price_limit_flag | one_price_limit_flag = one_price_limit_up_flag or one_price_limit_down_flag |
| ohlc_relation_error_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ohlc_relation_error_flag | OHLC 价格关系异常标记 |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 |

| market_cap_to_parent_profit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | market_cap_to_parent_profit | market_cap_to_parent_profit = total_mv * 10000 / parent_net_profit_single_quarter_value_asof |

## derived_capital_flow_full_v

Phase 3 资金流与交易行为完整视图

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| small_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_buy_amount | 小单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_sm_amount，单位万元 |
| small_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_sell_amount | 小单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_sm_amount，单位万元 |
| small_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_net_amount | 小单净流入额 = buy_sm_amount - sell_sm_amount，单位万元 |
| medium_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | medium_buy_amount | 中单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_md_amount，单位万元 |
| medium_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | medium_sell_amount | 中单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_md_amount，单位万元 |
| medium_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | medium_net_amount | 中单净流入额 = buy_md_amount - sell_md_amount，单位万元 |
| large_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_buy_amount | 大单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_lg_amount，单位万元 |
| large_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_sell_amount | 大单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_lg_amount，单位万元 |
| large_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_net_amount | 大单净流入额 = buy_lg_amount - sell_lg_amount，单位万元 |
| extra_large_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_buy_amount | 超大单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_elg_amount，单位万元 |
| extra_large_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_sell_amount | 超大单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_elg_amount，单位万元 |
| extra_large_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_net_amount | 超大单净流入额 = buy_elg_amount - sell_elg_amount，单位万元 |

| main_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_sell_amount | 主力卖出额 = large_sell_amount + extra_large_sell_amount，单位万元 |

Phase 3 概念日频上下文缓存

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `concept_id, trade_date`

| concept_narrow_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_flag | 是否窄口径概念 = concept_stock_count >= 5 AND concept_member_share <= 0.10 |

## derived_index_daily_cache

Phase 3 指数日频缓存

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `index_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| index_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | index_code | 指数代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| index_name | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | index_name | 指数名称 |
| index_close | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | index_close | 指数收盘价 |
| index_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | index_ret_2 | 2日指数收益 = close / lag(close,2) - 1 |
| index_ret_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | index_ret_3 | 3日指数收益 = close / lag(close,3) - 1 |
| index_ret_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | index_ret_5 | 5日指数收益 = close / lag(close,5) - 1 |
| index_ret_10 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | index_ret_10 | 10日指数收益 = close / lag(close,10) - 1 |
| index_ret_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | index_ret_20 | 20日指数收益 = close / lag(close,20) - 1 |

## derived_concept_stock_context_cache

Phase 3 个股概念多周期列表缓存

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| concept_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_count | 所属概念数量 = count_distinct(concept_member.concept_id) |
| concept_ids_all | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_ids_all | 全部所属概念ID列表 = string_agg(concept_member.concept_id,';') |
| concept_names_all | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_names_all | 全部所属概念名称列表 = string_agg(concept_member.concept_name,';') |
| concept_broad_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_broad_count | 宽泛概念数量 = sum(derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_broad_flag) |
| concept_narrow_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_count | 窄口径概念数量 = sum(derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_narrow_flag) |
| concept_ids_top_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_ids_top_2 | 2日领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_names_top_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_names_top_2 | 2日领涨概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_lagging_ids_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_lagging_ids_2 | 2日领跌概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_min(concept_member.concept_id, concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_lagging_names_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_lagging_names_2 | 2日领跌概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_min(concept_name, concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_active_ids_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_active_ids_2 | 2日活跃概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, concept_amount_pct_all_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_active_names_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_active_names_2 | 2日活跃概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, concept_amount_pct_all_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_narrow_leading_ids_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_leading_ids_2 | 2日窄口径领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_id, CASE WHEN concept_narrow_flag THEN concept_ret_2 END, 5), ';') |
| concept_narrow_leading_names_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_leading_names_2 | 2日窄口径领涨概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, CASE WHEN concept_narrow_flag THEN concept_ret_2 END, 5), ';') |
| concept_best_id_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_best_id_2 | 2日领涨概念ID = arg_max(concept_id, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_best_name_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_best_name_2 | 2日领涨概念名称 = arg_max(concept_name, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_best_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_best_ret_2 | 2日领涨概念收益 = max(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_worst_id_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_id_2 | 2日领跌概念ID = arg_min(concept_id, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_worst_name_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_name_2 | 2日领跌概念名称 = arg_min(concept_name, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_worst_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_ret_2 | 2日领跌概念收益 = min(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_avg_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_avg_ret_2 | 所属概念2日平均收益 = avg(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_median_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_median_ret_2 | 所属概念2日中位收益 = median(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_max_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_max_ret_2 | 所属概念2日最大收益 = max(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_min_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_min_ret_2 | 所属概念2日最小收益 = min(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_ret_spread_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_spread_2 | 所属概念2日收益跨度 = max(concept_ret_2) - min(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_positive_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_positive_count_2 | 2日正收益概念数量 = count(concept_ret_2 > 0) |
| concept_negative_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_negative_count_2 | 2日负收益概念数量 = count(concept_ret_2 < 0) |
| concept_avg_amount_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_avg_amount_2 | 所属概念2日平均成交额 = avg(concept_amount_ma_2) |
| concept_main_flow_sum_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_main_flow_sum_2 | 所属概念2日主力净流入均值 = avg(concept_main_flow_sum_2) |
| concept_hot_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_hot_count_2 | 2日高热概念数量 = count(concept_hot_flag_2) |
| concept_ids_top_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_ids_top_3 | 3日领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_ret_3, 5), ';') |
